name: python3-aiohttp-session
title: python3-aiohttp-session
description:
provides sessions for aiohttp.web
The library allows us to store user-specific data into a session object.
.
The session object has a dict-like interface (operations like
session[key] = value, value = session[key] etc. are present).
.
Before processing the session in a web-handler, you have to register the
session middleware in aiohttp.web.Application.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiohttp-session because provides sessions for aiohttp.web.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiohttp-session as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiohttp-session with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiohttp-session --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
